title: [MTR4] London Underground Piccadilly Line 2024 Tube Stock
description: Adds the 2024 tube stock to MTR
body:
This pack is made by Skywalker_6517 for the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) version 4.x

The pack adds the London Underground 2024 stock, which runs on the Piccadilly Line. The train runs in 9 cars, with 3 major coach types.

The pack adds these coaches:
- Cab forwards
- Trailer short (no underside bogie)
- Trailer standard
- Cab backwards

The recommended consist is to have the short coaches between other coaches to create the levitating effect on the real train. If you would like to run heritage tours on your line, feel free to download the [LTM 1938 stock](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/1938-stock-for-mtr-mod), which used to run on the Piccadilly Line.

# **NEW UPDATE PREVIEW AVAILABLE [HERE](https://www.patreon.com/posts/2024-stock-159540447)**

As of now (May 13th) the real train is still testing and therefore the accuracy of the model may be affected.
